text:
On Jun 30, 2008, at 2:58 PM, Jo Rhett wrote:
> A full patch from the current ports revision to 2.2.7 is included  
> below.  This resolves the manpage/plist concerns raised previously.


FYI you'll notice that patch-configure is made to be blank by this  
patch.  I don't know how to remove files in a patch, but that file  
should be removed.
